description: Enrich grouped library rows with CVE data. Writes one finding per CVE match. Owner: sca-correlation-transform.

script.description: Check version match and promote vuln fields if matched
script.source: def match = ctx._vuln_match; if (match == null) { ctx._drop = true; return; } def vuln_versions = match['vulnerability.vulnerable_versions']; def lib_ver = ctx['library.version']; if (vuln_versions == null || !vuln_versions.contains(lib_ver)) { ctx._drop = true; return; } ctx['vulnerability.id']           = match['vulnerability.id']; ctx['vulnerability.cve_id']       = match['vulnerability.cve_id']; ctx['vulnerability.severity']     = match['vulnerability.severity']; ctx['vulnerability.cvss_vector']  = match['vulnerability.cvss_vector']; ctx['vulnerability.cvss_type']    = match['vulnerability.cvss_type']; ctx['vulnerability.cwe_ids']      = match['vulnerability.cwe_ids']; ctx['vulnerability.fix_version']  = match['vulnerability.fix_version']; ctx['vulnerability.published_at'] = match['vulnerability.published_at']; ctx['finding.status'] = 'open'; ctx._drop = false;
